sections.imageAlt: French bulldog at the veterinary clinic
sections.heading: Step into the *world of furry* Friends!
sections.subheading: Whether you're looking for a veterinarian, groomer, or a compassionate care team — we're crafted to cater to your unique needs and aspirations.

sections.heading: Health and wellness *from nose to tail*
sections.subheading: Comprehensive care designed for every stage of your pet's life — because they deserve nothing but the best.

items.title: Transport
items.description: Convenient transportation for your pet to grooming, vet visits, and more.

items.title: Wellness
items.description: Routine health check-ups, vaccinations, and emergency care to keep your pet in top shape.

items.title: Walking
items.description: Regular walks and exercise to keep your pet active and healthy.

items.title: Training
items.description: Obedience and behavioural training to ensure your pet is well-behaved and happy.

items.title: Boarding
items.description: Safe and comfortable overnight care for your pets while you're away.

items.title: Pet Grooming
items.description: Keep your pet clean with professional grooming services, including baths, trims, and nail care.
